rankings.name: Favori De Champdou
key_positive_factors: Top RPR (173) and TS (158) in the field
Improving form (RPR 166 -> 173)
Dominant 8-length winner over C&D in January
key_risks: Relatively unexposed in this discipline compared to veterans

rankings.name: Stumptown
key_positive_factors: Dual C&D winner last season
Winner of the prestigious Velka Pardubicka cross-country marathon in October
key_risks: Low Top Speed (79) compared to main rivals

rankings.name: Vanillier
key_positive_factors: Proven class (2nd in 2023 Grand National)
Recent winner on Bank course at Punchestown
High Top Speed (157)
key_risks: Nearly took wrong course in this race last year

rankings.name: Desertmore House
key_positive_factors: Winner over 3m on Bank course in November
Strong Cross-Country credentials (2nd in La Touche Cup)
key_risks: 3lb out of the handicap weights today
Untested on the unique Cheltenham X-Country course

rankings.name: Final Orders
key_positive_factors: C&D winner in December on good ground
High TS (154) indicates tactical speed
key_risks: Weakened significantly on softer ground last time out

rankings.name: The Goffer
key_positive_factors: Finished a strong 4th in this race last season
First-time cheekpieces applied to sharpen focus
key_risks: Effectively 5lb higher in the weights than last year
Running from out of the handicap

rankings.name: Pied Piper
key_positive_factors: Talented handicap chaser
Respectable recent form in major Leopardstown handicaps
key_risks: Fell on latest start in the Thyestes

rankings.name: Latenightpass
key_positive_factors: C&D winner and 2nd in this race last year
key_risks: Veteran status (13yo) and regressive form this term

rankings.name: Fakir D'Oudairies
key_positive_factors: Multiple Grade 1 winner over regulation fences
Respectable 4th at Punchestown last month
key_risks: Best form is over shorter trips

rankings.name: Conflated
key_positive_factors: High class at peak (Dual 3m G1 winner)
Placed on Bank course last month
key_risks: Well beaten on only previous C&D start

rankings.name: Velvet Elvis
key_positive_factors: 2nd in 2025 Thyestes shows latent ability
Visor tried for the first time
key_risks: Out of sorts since stable change

rankings.name: Famous Bridge
key_positive_factors: Solid 6th in last year's Ultima
Thorough stayer

rankings.name: Horantzau D'airy
key_positive_factors: Useful handicap form in Ireland previously

rankings.name: Minella Crooner
key_positive_factors: Capable G1 performer for previous stable
key_risks: Pulled up in this race last year

pace_analysis.insight: A searching gallop led by Latenightpass and Final Orders will test stamina, playing directly into the hands of the high-class and course-dominant Favori De Champdou.
